content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "This is the reference exemplar for framework-as-synthesis. The coach deploys multiple signature AoA questions verbatim at precisely the right moments: 'what's the most profound positive shift?' (turn 4) when the original question is intellectual; 'what's essentially you?' (turn 12) pointing at awareness as substrate; the signature inversion 'how do you not trust it?' (turn 22) deployed exactly when the client locks into a 'how do I trust X' frame; and the signature reframe 'if you think you're making a decision, you're in fear' (turn 38). The coach also names the read with AoA-specific language ('intellectual question and not personal to you' / 'your emotional body is not having an intellectual conversation') in turn 2, distinguishes the framework from the territory (turn 16: tarot, ages as alternative constructs — dissolving identification with parts work without devaluing it), and uses present-moment evidence ('you just spoke', turn 26; 'it's happening right now', turn 30) to dissolve the question rather than answer it. No anti-AoA frames, no CBT reframing, no IFS-without-twist (the coach explicitly honors parts work then dissolves identification with it). Methodology emerges from the moment rather than being applied as procedure.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 12, 16, 18, 22, 26, 30, 32, 34, 38, 40],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the read in AoA language — intellectual-question-with-emotional-body — and offers the client choice rather than pursuing the stated topic."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature question 'what's the most profound positive shift?' deployed to find the live want behind the should."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'What's essentially you?' — points at awareness as substrate, idea-of-self-vs-actual-self."},
    {"turn": 16, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Dissolves identification with the parts-work construct by offering alternative framings (ages, tarot) — honors the framework while loosening grip."},
    {"turn": 18, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the insight: 'all your thoughts are both false and true' — the i-cant-trust-my-thoughts-right-now territory."},
    {"turn": 22, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature inversion 'how do you not trust it?' deployed at the exact moment the client locks into 'how do I trust X' framing."},
    {"turn": 26, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'You just spoke' — present-moment evidence as the move, not analysis."},
    {"turn": 30, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'It's happening right now' — anchors awareness in live action."},
    {"turn": 32, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Synthesis: parts + awareness + present-moment as one integrated move."},
    {"turn": 34, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Closes the loop: 'if you're talking, you're trusting your intuition' — dissolves the question rather than answering it."},
    {"turn": 38, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature reframe: 'if you think you're making a decision, you're in fear' — decisions-are-emotional principle applied directly."},
    {"turn": 40, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Grounds the abstract principle in concrete micro-decisions just made in the room."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body", "i-dont-buy-your-story", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "i-cant-trust-my-thoughts-right-now", "idea-of-self-vs-actual-self", "view", "whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift", "how-do-you-not-trust-it", "what-am-i"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["press-the-button-thought-experiment", "anxiety-three-definitions", "emotions-and-stories-dance"],
  "notes": "The 'misses' are not real misses — the coach reached the same destination via a different signature route (present-moment-evidence + decisions-are-emotional). Framework-as-synthesis, not framework-as-procedure."
}
